title: GrowGeneration Reports Mixed Third Quarter 2024 Results
text: GrowGeneration Q3 2024 Mixed Results Analysis. Positives: Same-store sales growth of 12.5% year-over-year strong. Proprietary brand penetration increasing to 23.8%. Cash position solid at $55.2 million. Negatives: Net sales down 10.2% year-over-year to $50 million. Gross margin compression to 21.6% from 29.1%. Adjusted EBITDA loss of $2.4 million. EPS: -$0.19 per share vs -$0.12 estimate. Company Still Executing Plan: Store consolidations ongoing. E-commerce investment continuing. Digital platform launch Q4 2024. Management Outlook: Restructuring costs temporary. Core operations showing strength. Path to profitability remains on track. Industry headwinds moderating.
